name: JUMPY BUNNY
short_description: Reach the top of the burrow! Jump, jump, and jump. This game is about jumping with precision and determination. Oh yeah, it's also playable with your friends.
detailed_description:
JUMPY BUNNY is a 3D precision platform game in which you jump in an annoying way!

Enjoy the journey of a silly bunny who must reach the top of the burrow.

This game features...

  • Control a silly jumping creature

  • Discover accessories to put on your rabbit as if it were a doll

  • Large burrow to explore and complete

Gameplay

Hold to jump higher and glide consuming energy. You will find more energy through the level!

As there are no checkpoints, you will have to be careful not to waste your energy or be brave and face the challenges without needing it...

Story

-Wait... do people really care about this in these kinds of games?

-Hmm, whatever, let's say enough to fill this section with content.

The fearless Bunny faces an intense journey searching for the true reason to exist in a world full of bad vibes. In a post-apocalyptic world where carrots eradicate humanity, and you are the only hope for... the world?

-Well, I guess that's enough, isn't it?
-You maybe don't need to expect too much of this game -.-

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Spanish - Latin America, French, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
